user.title: Add app to track
user.description: Track the version of an app from the Apple App Store or Google Play.

data_description.app_id: App Store: numeric ID (e.g. 544007664) or bundle ID (e.g. com.google.ios.youtube). Google Play: package name (e.g. com.google.android.youtube).
data_description.country: Two-letter ISO country code (e.g. us, cz, gb).

abort.already_configured: This app is already being tracked for the selected country.
